<answer> MOMOLAND </answer>

<think> MOMOLAND is a South Korean girl group. Polaris Entertainment manages MOMOLAND, so the subsidiary under Polaris Entertainment that manages Kim Lip is the one that manages MOMOLAND. </think>

<answer> Polaris Entertainment (MOMOLAND subsidiary) </answer>
